name: Deployment Checks
summary: Automated pre- and post-deployment checklist and runbook to make releases repeatable and auditable. The pipeline checks are live; remaining work is rollback drills and team rollout.
progress: Post-deployment smoke tests run on every release.
Runbook published with sign-off gates per environment.
Slack notifications wired for pass/fail status.
upcoming: Run a full rollback drill in staging.
Roll the process out to the wider engineering team.
Add release metrics dashboard (lead time, change-fail rate).

risks.risk: Teams bypass the checklist under release pressure.
risks.mitigation: Make checks a required pipeline gate, not optional.
